opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My skin is so dry and incredibly itchy that I've been scratching until I bleed, and I haven't slept in two days.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My eczema has flared badly with unbearable itching and I can't sleep.

symptom_narrative.onset: chronic, flared over 48h with dry weather
symptom_narrative.character: very dry, scaly, intensely itchy red patches in the elbow/knee creases
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: scratching until bleeding; no sleep for 2 days
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: inside my elbows and behind my knees, and dry all over
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: thickened skin from rubbing; groin/armpits spared; NO weeping yellow fluid, honey crusts, punched-out blisters or fever
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: long-standing eczema; also has hay fever

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; dry heated home, no humidifier; using scented products

objective_data_offered.value: dry scaly skin with red itchy patches and scratch marks in elbow/knee creases, thickened skin on wrists/neck, visible on video
no weeping yellow fluid, no crusts/blisters, no fever
